commands.review_summary:
The branch adds optional identity targets to transcript update events, routes gateway/history/memory subscribers by identity, and threads session identity through core and bundled plugin emitters while retaining file-backed `sessionFile` compatibility.

PR surface: Source +130, Tests +219, Generated 0. Total +349 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a refactor/API-contract PR rather than a bug report. Source and tests show the intended identity-only event path, but I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual maintainer review is required because the PR is draft/protected and changes a plugin-exposed event contract; automation should not choose the compatibility policy or stack order.

target.title: refactor: add transcript update identity contract
target.body:
## What

Adds storage-neutral identity to `SessionTranscriptUpdate` delivery while keeping `sessionFile` as deprecated file-backed compatibility for existing path-based emitters and subscribers.

## Why

Path 3 SQLite writer validation could not honestly route transcript update publication through SQLite while subscribers keyed solely on filesystem paths. This contract lets identity-bearing transcript writers publish updates without synthetic `sqlite:` paths, while preserving file-backed compatibility during the migration window.

Refs #88838.

## Changes

- Add update target identity
- Prefer identity in subscribers
- Preserve path compatibility
- Migrate internal emitters
- Cover gateway/history/memory

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/sessions/transcript-events.ts` | Adds normalized update target identity |
| `src/config/sessions/session-accessor.ts` | Publishes scoped update identity |
| `src/gateway/server-session-events.ts` | Routes session.message updates by identity |
| `src/gateway/sessions-history-http.ts` | Filters history updates by identity |
| `extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager-sync-ops.ts` | Schedules dirty work by runtime target identity |
| `extensions/{codex,copilot,telegram}/src/**` | Threads identity into transcript update emitters |
| `src/agents/**`, `src/config/sessions/transcript.ts`, `src/sessions/user-turn-transcript.ts` | Adds identity where existing callers know session scope |

## Testing

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/sessions/transcript-events.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager-sync-ops.startup-catchup.test.ts src/config/sessions/session-accessor.test.ts src/gateway/session-message-events.test.ts src/gateway/sessions-history-http.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check ...`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ...`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json ...`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json ...`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json ...`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json ...`
- `git diff --check`
- Autoreview found one path-target issue; fixed in follow-up commit and rerun clean.
target.author: jalehman
